title: Report: Alibaba to Launch Qwen Office, Integrating Three Intelligent Entities to Enter the AI Office Market
excerpt: On July 21, according to Caijing, Alibaba plans to launch the "Qwen Office" product and has completed the integration of three intelligent agent (Agent) product
content_html:
On July 21, according to Caijing, Alibaba plans to launch the "Qwen Office" product and has completed the integration of three intelligent agent (Agent) products under its portfolio: QoderWork, Wukong, and MuleRun. This product will become an important move by Alibaba in the Agent office market, responsible for driving the practical application of AI in enterprise office scenarios.

It is understood that Qwen Office is led by Chen Yusen, the new CEO of DingTalk. In June, Chen Hang, the founder and former CEO of DingTalk, stepped down, and Chen Yusen took over the relevant business. At the beginning of July, Alibaba assigned the three Agent products to Chen Yusen for unified management and integration, accelerating the collaboration of the office intelligent agent business.

From a product planning perspective, Qwen Office will be built upon QoderWork as its core foundation. Industry insiders stated that QoderWork is currently one of the largest user-scale and better-received intelligent agent products under Alibaba; in comparison, Wukong has been in the product improvement stage for a long time, and MuleRun was mainly aimed at overseas markets previously. Therefore, this integration will take QoderWork as the main platform for implementation.

As large model technology rapidly enters the office field, AI office agents are becoming a new area of competition among internet and tech companies. Compared with traditional office software, Agent products can complete complex tasks such as document processing, information organization, and workflow automation by understanding user needs, independently performing tasks, and calling tools.

Alibaba's integration of multiple intelligent agent products signifies its further concentration of resources to build a unified AI office entry point. In the future, whether Qwen Office can form a differentiated competition based on Alibaba Cloud, DingTalk, and the Qwen large model ecosystem will be a key point in its enterprise-level AI application market.

content_html_zh:
7月21日，据《财经》报道，阿里巴巴计划推出“Qwen Office”产品，并已完成旗下QoderWork、Wukong、MuleRun三款智能代理（Agent）产品的整合。 该产品将成为阿里巴巴在代工办公市场的重要举措，负责推动人工智能在企业办公场景的实际应用。

据了解，Qwen Office由钉钉新任CEO陈玉森领导。 6月，钉钉创始人、前CEO陈航卸任，陈玉森接手相关业务。 7月初，阿里巴巴将三款Agent产品交给陈玉森统一管理和整合，加速办公智能座席业务的协同。

从产品规划来看，Qwen Office将以QoderWork为核心基础。 业内人士表示，QoderWork是目前阿里巴巴旗下用户规模最大、口碑较好的智能座席产品之一；相比之下，悟空长期处于产品完善阶段，而骡跑此前主要针对海外市场。 因此，本次整合将以QoderWork作为主要实施平台。

随着大模技术快速进入办公领域，人工智能办公坐席正在成为互联网和科技公司竞争的新领域。 与传统办公软件相比，Agent产品通过了解用户需求、独立执行任务、调用工具，可以完成文档处理、信息组织、工作流程自动化等复杂任务。

阿里巴巴此次整合多款智能坐席产品，标志着阿里巴巴进一步集中资源，打造统一的AI办公入口。 未来，Qwen Office能否基于阿里云、钉钉、Qwen大模型生态形成差异化竞争，将是其企业级AI应用市场的关键点。
